description: PARSE/END 有效输出样例（6 城 · 2 国）。客户端可解析；真实项目须用运行结果替换，勿写死在 END 节点。

workflow_run_outputs.society_json: {"world_rules": "世界名为埃瑟拉……", "nations": [{"id": "nation-001", "government": "君主立宪", "culture": "重商", "description": "奥兰多王国……", "authorSettings": ""}, {"id": "nation-002", "government": "封建帝国", "culture": "武勋农耕", "description": "达贡帝国……", "authorSettings": ""}], "locations": [{"id": "loc-001", "name": "碧波堡", "type": "capital", "x": 25.5, "y": 45.3, "nationId": "nation-001", "terrain": "coast", "climate": "温带海洋性", "description": "奥兰多王国首都……", "population": "约15万"}]}
workflow_run_outputs.world_rules: 世界名为埃瑟拉，处于铁器时代与魔法余晖交织的纪元……

checklist: locations 条数 = local_location_count（本样例演示 6 城；真实运行每批须满 local_location_count，客户端每批≤8 座）
每条 locations.id 与 territory_json.localDraftLocations.id 完全一致
x/y/type/terrain/nationId 与 localDraft 相同，只改 name/description
